payload.query: What are the leading factors contributing to partisan polarization in the United States? Explain how this dynamic has unfolded, discussing both elite and mass public polarization.

articles.title: Manolo Villaverde, Tender Father on Bilingual TV Show, Dies at 89
articles.abstract: He played Pepe Peña on “¿Qué Pasa, U.S.A.?,” a series about a Cuban American family that is believed to be the United States’ first bilingual sitcom.
articles.snippet: He played Pepe Peña on “¿Qué Pasa, U.S.A.?,” a series about a Cuban American family that is believed to be the United States’ first bilingual sitcom.

articles.title: Trump Says He’s Cutting Off Trade Negotiations With Canada
articles.abstract: The president said he was motivated by an ad, paid for by the province of Ontario, that featured Ronald Reagan criticizing tariffs in a 1987 radio address.
articles.snippet: The president said he was motivated by an ad, paid for by the province of Ontario, that featured Ronald Reagan criticizing tariffs in a 1987 radio address.
articles.byline: By Ana Swanson and Matina Stevis-Gridneff

articles.title: Trump Administration Lifts Some Food Tariffs in Effort to Ease Prices
articles.abstract: It is walking back levies on imports including beef and coffee in what critics say is an admission that tariffs raised prices in the first place.
articles.snippet: It is walking back levies on imports including beef and coffee in what critics say is an admission that tariffs raised prices in the first place.

articles.title: A Club for Team U.S.A. Was Called ‘Ice House.’ The Name Didn’t Stick the Landing.
articles.abstract: U.S. Olympic officials are changing the name to Winter House, as Italians protest the similarly named federal agency’s presence at the Games in Italy.
articles.snippet: U.S. Olympic officials are changing the name to Winter House, as Italians protest the similarly named federal agency’s presence at the Games in Italy.
keywords: United States Olympic and Paralympic Committee

articles.title: ‘Broken My Hope’: Trump’s Move to Slash Refugee Arrivals Ricochets Widely
articles.abstract: President Trump’s policy has shut the door on all but a tiny fraction of people across the world seeking refuge in the United States from conflict, persecution or both.
articles.snippet: President Trump’s policy has shut the door on all but a tiny fraction of people across the world seeking refuge in the United States from conflict, persecution or both.

articles.title: Trump’s Response to Shooting Shows Intensified Anti-Migrant Stance
articles.abstract: The president is furiously demanding limits on migration and attacking ethnic groups as he steps up his efforts to equate immigration with crime and economic distress.
articles.snippet: The president is furiously demanding limits on migration and attacking ethnic groups as he steps up his efforts to equate immigration with crime and economic distress.
keywords: US Federal Takeover of Metropolitan Police Dept (DC)

articles.title: Maduro, Pulled Into the U.S. Justice System, Says He Was Kidnapped
articles.abstract: “I’m innocent. I’m not guilty. I am a decent man,” the captured Venezuelan president told a judge in Manhattan federal court. “I am still president of my country.”
articles.snippet: “I’m innocent. I’m not guilty. I am a decent man,” the captured Venezuelan president told a judge in Manhattan federal court. “I am still president of my country.”
articles.byline: By Jonah E. Bromwich, Benjamin Weiser, Maia Coleman and Hurubie Meko

articles.title: Fact-Checking President Trump’s Davos Speech
articles.abstract: The president gave misleading accounts of the U.S. role in Greenland’s history and the North Atlantic Treaty Organization, among other claims.
articles.snippet: The president gave misleading accounts of the U.S. role in Greenland’s history and the North Atlantic Treaty Organization, among other claims.
keywords: United States Defense and Military Forces

articles.title: Trump Says He Has Framework for Greenland Deal as NATO Mulls Idea of U.S. Sovereignty Over Bases
articles.abstract: President Trump’s announcement appeared to draw the United States back from the possibility of military and economic conflict with American allies over Greenland.
articles.snippet: President Trump’s announcement appeared to draw the United States back from the possibility of military and economic conflict with American allies over Greenland.
articles.byline: By Lara Jakes, Jim Tankersley and Zolan Kanno-Youngs

articles.title: Overturning the Global Trade System, Trump Puts His Ideas to the Test
articles.abstract: President Trump has long wanted to rework world trade. The tariffs set to go into effect next week will carry out that plan.
articles.snippet: President Trump has long wanted to rework world trade. The tariffs set to go into effect next week will carry out that plan.
